question: What government position was held by the woman who portrayed Corliss Archer in the film Kiss and Tell?
answer: Chief of Protocol of the United States

context.title: Kiss and Tell
sentences: Kiss and Tell is a 1945 American comedy film.
The film stars Shirley Temple as Corliss Archer.

context.title: Shirley Temple
sentences: Shirley Temple was an American actress, singer, dancer, businesswoman, and diplomat.
She served as Chief of Protocol of the United States.

question: Are both The Golden Bowl and The Wings of the Dove novels by Henry James?

context.title: The Golden Bowl
sentences: The Golden Bowl is a 1904 novel by Henry James.

context.title: The Wings of the Dove
sentences: The Wings of the Dove is a 1902 novel by Henry James.
It has been adapted for film and television.
